series_metadata.series_title: OUF-1 Sum Report, and OUF-2 Unclaimed Funds Owner Information
series_metadata.series_description: OUF-1 Sum Report Forms are used by holders to report and remit unclaimed property. The OUF-1 Form lists holder name and contact information including total funds reported. The OUF-2 form lists owner detail such as name, account number, address, tax ID, and amount remitted.

retention_rules.disposition: Electronic: Images on the computer are to be maintained permanently. ; Paper: Retain two years, Electronic: Permanent ; Paper: Shred
